title: Remove and inspect engine oil jets/bolts

blocks.text: Remove and inspect engine oil jets/bolts
Remove the oil jet bolt (A) and remove the oil jet (B).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

Inspect the nozzle (A) for a hole diameter of 1.1 mm. Check the oil jet bolts (B) and inspect each hole (C) for a hole diameter of 0.9 mm. Check oil jet bolt Check that the ball (D) moves smoothly and has a stroke of at least approx. 2.0 mm.

items: If the nozzle of the oil jet is bent or damaged, it should be replaced.
When inspecting the hole diameter, insert a 1.05 mm round bar.

items.text: If the nozzle of the oil jet is bent or damaged, it should be replaced.
If the nozzle of the oil jet is bent or damaged, it should be replaced.
When inspecting the hole diameter, insert a 1.05 mm round bar.

items: When inspecting, insert a 0.8 mm round rod that will not damage the check ball.
When inspecting, insert a 0.8 mm round rod that will not damage the check ball.
